---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Command run (e.g. `uv run reid-train --config configs/default.yaml ...`)
2. Configuration / flags used
3. Error or unexpected output observed

## Expected behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Logs and traceback

```text
<paste the full error message / stack trace here>
```

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.11.9 -->
- PyTorch version: <!-- e.g. 2.3.0 -->
- CUDA / device: <!-- e.g. CUDA 12.1 GPU, or CPU-only -->
- Package version / commit: <!-- e.g. 0.1.0, or git SHA -->

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (dataset path, config file, etc.).
